title: eriophorella pumila
intro: Eriophorella pumila, also known as the small pinewort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lycopodiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Eriophorella pumila include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Eriophorella pumila can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
